name: Listen, Think, Meow!
short_description: Listen, Think, Meow! is an audiobook with missing words. If you can't find the word then its time to start meowing for the hint. Oh and if you are struggling you might need a "meow".
detailed_description:
About

The game uses George MacDonald's The Princess and the Goblin as source material.
Carefully selected hundreds of words has been removed from the book to let you find them.
And we added cats to make the audiobook more fun.
If you don't like reading books this might be your way in to the world of stories.
Even if you know the book it is still a challenge.

Features

Narration: All 32 chapters of the book is fully narrated. Yes it's an audiobook but narrator does meow!
Music: You are welcomed with a piece from Bach.
Missing Words: 300+ selected words has been removed from the book.
Hints: For each missing word you are given a hint but not free.
Cats: Feed the little cats to unlock hints. (Please don't disturb the narrator while doing it)
